title: Deleting/Selecting groups to include when boards are created from a template using automation

posts.author: Rhodesy (Matt Rhodes)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have an enterprise plan and I am trying to find a way to automatically create boards and at the same time select which groups are included within that board.

We have a form that is used to collect data and initiate the process.
I then use data from this form to use the automation feature ‘build a board from a template’.
The issue is that we have lots of groupings that are very unlikely to be used making the board long, with no benefit.

Is there away I can remove groups, or select the groups I want to be included.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Rhodesy - the only way around this would be to employ multiple templates and allow a choice with the status column to create the corresponding template.

Ex)
Status A Selected : Template A Used
Status B Selected : Template B Used
…etc

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: system (system)
